ref_text_raw: The parade of buildings that make the Hong Kong skyline has been likened to a glittering bar chart that is made apparent by the presence of the waters of Victoria Harbour.

text: The parade of buildings that make up the Hong Kong skyline has been likened to a glittering bar chart that is made apparent by the presence of the Warriors of Victoria Harbour.
